name: ogenti
description: ogenti — AI agents that control your OS

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx tsc
scripts.build:all: npm run build && cd electron && npm run build
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run lint" "cd backend && npm run lint"
scripts.test: concurrently "cd backend && npm test" "cd frontend && npm test"
